title: edible broken bad stuff
description: makes the stuff from create broken bad edible
body:
[![hosting ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d4ccf68084d5bcd931ec540bbe8cbcc4e51c16.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/axolotl-man)



# Important: if the mod doesn't work update to the latest version of broken bad [3.2.2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-broken-bad/files/5300121) or later

this mod makes the stuff from create broken bad edible and when you eat it you become very strong but if you eat too much you can get bad effects

how to get the stuff:

1.0/2.0: It replaces the stuff from broken bad so just make it as normal and you will get edible stuff

2.1: to get the edible stuff put stuff from broken bad in a crafting table and you can get edible stuff

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/edible-broken-bad-stuff)
